schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The "Free Scooty Distribution for Girls" scheme was launched by the Secondary Education Department, Government of Rajasthan in the year 2017-18, aims to encourage meritorious girl students belonging to the economically weaker section of the general category in the state. Under this scheme, meritorious girl students from government and private schools who have scored 85% or above in the Class 10th and 12th (Arts, Commerce, Science streams) examinations are provided with a free scooty, along with a helmet and petrol.
schemeContent.benefits_md: Under this scheme, Eligible girl students will receive a scooty, a helmet, and 2 liters of petrol.
schemeContent.exclusions_md: - The applicant should not have received a scooty through any other scheme.
schemeContent.briefDescription: Under this scheme, meritorious girl students from government and private schools who have scored 85% or above in the Class 10th and 12th (Arts, Commerce, Science streams) examinations are provided with a free scooty, along with a helmet and petrol.

children.text: The "Free Scooty Distribution for Girls" scheme was launched by the Secondary Education Department, Government of Rajasthan in the year 2017-18, aims to encourage meritorious girl students belonging to the economically weaker section of the general category in the state. Under this scheme, meritorious girl students from government and private schools who have scored 85% or above in the Class 10th and 12th (Arts, Commerce, Science streams) examinations are provided with a free scooty, along with a helmet and petrol.
Under this scheme, Eligible girl students will receive a scooty, a helmet, and 2 liters of petrol.
The applicant should not have received a scooty through any other scheme.
Application process:
Step 1:
The interested applicant visits the
official website
and clicks on the application form to download it.
Step 2:
In the application form, fill in all the mandatory fields and attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attested, if required).
Step 3:
Submit the duly filled and signed application form along with the documents to the respective school where the education is completed.

applicationProcess.process_md:
***Application process:***
**Step 1:** The interested applicant visits the [official website](https://evaluation.rajasthan.gov.in/scheme/detail/337) and clicks on the application form to download it. 
**Step 2:** In the application form, fill in all the mandatory fields and attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attested, if required).
**Step 3:** Submit the duly filled and signed application form along with the documents to the respective school where the education is completed.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md:
1. The applicant should be a native of Rajasthan.
1. The applicant should be a girl student. 
1. The applicant should belong to the Economically Weaker Section (EWS) of General Category. 
1. The applicant's family annual income should not exceed ₹2,50,000/-.
1. The applicant should have studied in a government or private school in Rajasthan.
1. The applicant should have secured at least 85% marks in class 10th or 12th.

children.text: The applicant should be a native of Rajasthan.
The applicant should be a girl student.

The applicant's family annual income should not exceed ₹2,50,000/-.
The applicant should have studied in a government or private school in Rajasthan.
The applicant should have secured at least 85% marks in class 10
th
or 12
